select_when: The modeled branch or section has stable signed net throughflow, no discrete path reversal, and RAF/RMF/SVF below TAMU-calibrated low-recirculation tolerances.
required_observations: signed mdot; Re; Pr; Gr or Gr_star; Ri; Ra; Gz; reset lengths; pressure basis; heat residual owner; wall/source terms; mesh/time UQ
allowed_outputs: ordinary branch pressure drop; developing f_D candidate; developing Nu candidate; one bulk T state
forbidden_outputs: single-stream coefficients on material-recirculation rows; hidden residual multipliers

select_when: A discrete modeled branch or junction path changes net sign, or a one-node junction cannot reproduce measured path pressure reversal while local branch topology is known.
required_observations: pressure nodes; signed path mdot values; split ratio; path velocity bases; junction geometry; mass conservation residual; topology/hysteresis check
allowed_outputs: path-specific signed head changes; path-specific K or resistance fields; topology-state diagnostics
forbidden_outputs: wall/core counterflow inside one branch; local recirculation-cell temperature; scalar tee K applied across all paths

select_when: Net branch throughflow remains defined, but persistent local reverse area/mass, stagnant volume, or stratified exchange invalidates one bulk state without proving discrete branch net reversal.
required_observations: mdot_main; T_main; p_main; RAF; RMF; SVF; R_mu; R_rho; V_recirc; mdot_exchange; T_recirc; wall/source heat terms; pressure residual; energy residual; residence time
allowed_outputs: named exchange-cell state; pressure_residual target; energy_residual target; section-effective recirculation penalty; regime diagnostic
forbidden_outputs: ordinary Nu/f_D/K; component K; F6 promotion; hidden global friction or heat multiplier

select_when: Required topology, same-window pressure/thermal, volume, denominator, or uncertainty fields are absent or contradictory.
required_observations: available partial evidence plus missing-field reason
allowed_outputs: blocker queue; evidence requirement; non-admission explanation
forbidden_outputs: coefficient admission; switching threshold selection; runtime Fluid behavior
